message:
Integrate changelog-adder into validation workflow

- Add changelog job that runs after validation succeeds
- Rename jobs for clarity:
  - structure: validates plugin system organization/metadata
  - agentskills: validates skills against external spec
  - changelog: adds entry for PRs (depends on both)
- Remove separate changelog-adder.yaml workflow
- Add concurrency to prevent duplicate changelog entries

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -61,7 +61,7 @@ runs:
           Analyze this PR and run /changelog:add if there are user-facing changes.
           If you create an entry, commit it to this PR branch.
           If there are no user-facing changes, do nothing.
-        claude_args: "--agent changelog:adder"
+        claude_args: "--agent changelog:adder --allowedTools Read,Glob,Grep,Bash,Write,Edit,Skill,SlashCommand"
         plugin_marketplaces: "https://github.com/tenzir/claude-plugins.git"
         plugins: |
           changelog@tenzir

@@ -1,26 +0,0 @@
-name: Add Changelog Entry
-
-on:
-  pull_request:
-    types: [opened, synchronize]
-
-concurrency:
-  group: changelog-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
-  cancel-in-progress: true
-
-jobs:
-  changelog:
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    permissions:
-      contents: write
-      pull-requests: write
-    steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-        with:
-          fetch-depth: 0
-          ref: ${{ github.head_ref }}
-
-      - name: Add changelog entry
-        uses: ./.github/actions/changelog-adder
-        with:
-          anthropic_oauth_token: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}

@@ -10,19 +10,19 @@ on:
   workflow_dispatch:
 
 jobs:
-  validate:
+  structure:
+    name: Validate structure
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-
     steps:
       - name: Checkout repository
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Run validation
         run: ./scripts/validate-plugins.sh
 
-  validate-skills:
+  agentskills:
+    name: Validate agentskills
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-
     steps:
       - name: Checkout repository
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -49,3 +49,25 @@ jobs:
             exit 1
           fi
           echo "All skills validated successfully"
+
+  changelog:
+    name: Add changelog entry
+    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
+    needs: [structure, agentskills]
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    permissions:
+      contents: write
+      pull-requests: write
+    concurrency:
+      group: changelog-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
+      cancel-in-progress: true
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 0
+          ref: ${{ github.head_ref }}
+
+      - name: Add changelog entry
+        uses: ./.github/actions/changelog-adder
+        with:
+          anthropic_oauth_token: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
